draw.title: Group Draw
draw.subtitle: Assign each team to a group
draw.confirm_fin_msg: This will automatically generate all group stage matches (round-robin). You can then set the time and referee for each match.
draw.confirm_reset_msg: All groups, assignments and group matches will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
draw.schedule_sub: Set time and referee — teams are already fixed

terms.subtitle: Official Organizational Constitution — 26 Articles
terms.tribute: Wafaa Edition — in memory of martyr pilot Bennadja Youcef and the late Boudjemaa Selimane
terms.presidency_title: Joint Presidency of the Organizing Committee
terms.commitment_p1: I, the undersigned, captain/coach of team:
terms.commitment_p2_pre: , declare that I have read and understood the
terms.commitment_p2_post: (26 articles), and pledge full compliance with it and all decisions of the organizing committee (Hammani Ayoub or Abada Mohamed).
terms.commitment_p3: I also declare that I am responsible for informing all members of my team of these rules and I accept all penalties resulting from their violation or damage to tournament equipment or organizers.
terms.cta_sub: Register now and write your name in tournament history
terms.ch1_art1_item0: The team consists of a maximum of 10 players (6 on the field + 4 substitutes)
terms.ch1_art1_item1: 10 players must be listed on each match sheet
terms.ch1_art2_item0: The tournament is open to players over 18 years old
terms.ch1_art2_item1: Players under 18 may participate if they are talented and distinguished
terms.ch1_art2_item2: The age rule does not apply to the goalkeeper
terms.ch1_art3_item0: Replacing any player throughout the tournament is prohibited
terms.ch1_art3_item1: A player removed from their squad cannot play for another team permanently
terms.ch1_art4_item0: Players beyond 10 may be added with a 1,000 DZD fine
terms.ch1_art4_item1: Condition: the transferred player must not be on another team
terms.ch1_art4_item2: No more than 10 players can participate in a single match
terms.ch1_art5_item0: Each team appoints one captain or coach (digitally registered) as the committee liaison
terms.ch1_art5_item1: Wearing a uniform kit is mandatory
terms.ch1_art5_item2: Inform the committee of the adopted color 24 hours before the match
terms.ch1_art6_item0: The team account is managed by one person only (coach or captain)
terms.ch1_art6_item1: Each team manager is required to inform their players of the rules
terms.ch1_art6_item2: Ignorance of the rules does not excuse from penalties
terms.ch2_art1_item1: A team is considered forfeit and loses 3-0 if 30 minutes late
terms.ch2_art2_item0: The match does not start with fewer than 4 players + a goalkeeper
terms.ch2_art3_item0: Substitutions are open from the center of the field (handball system)
terms.ch2_art3_item1: Condition: the outgoing player must leave before the substitute enters
terms.ch2_art4_item0: Goalkeeper change is only allowed once during the match
terms.ch2_art4_item1: Two goalkeepers may be in the squad of 10 subject to compliance with the field number
terms.ch2_art5_item0: Access is limited to: registered players, coach (registered), medic, referee, and organizing committee
terms.ch2_art5_item1: Strictly forbidden for any other person to enter, even an injured player
terms.ch2_art6_item0: Postponing matches under any circumstances is prohibited
terms.ch2_art6_item1: The only exception: an exceptional decision by the organizing committee
terms.ch3_title: Chapter 3: Penalties, Discipline and Equipment Protection
terms.ch3_art1_item0: Fines are recorded on the platform as soon as they occur
terms.ch3_art1_item1: The team is prohibited from playing the next match before settling fines
terms.ch3_art1_row2_p: Banned from next match until payment settled
terms.ch3_art2_item0: Registered fines and cards are final and cannot be discussed or changed
terms.ch3_art3_item0: Immediate expulsion for any obscene or insulting act
terms.ch3_art3_item1: Immediate elimination from the tournament for any unsportsmanlike conduct (verbal or physical)
terms.ch3_art4_item0: Awarded for exemplary conduct and noble sportsmanship
terms.ch3_art4_item1: Recorded as positive encouragement to honor the most disciplined team or player at the end of the tournament
terms.ch3_art5_item0: Tournament equipment (balls, mascot, boards) must be preserved
terms.ch3_art5_item1: Any damage or loss of equipment exposes the responsible team to an immediate fine and disciplinary action
terms.ch3_art6_item0: Disrespecting any member of the organizing committee or referees is strictly prohibited
terms.ch3_art6_item1: Any verbal or physical aggression against organizers results in permanent elimination from the tournament
terms.ch4_art1_item0: The digital platform is the sole reference for tournament results and statistics
terms.ch4_art2_item0: Appointment of referees is an exclusive prerogative of the organizing committee
terms.ch4_art2_item1: Referee decisions (after VAR in decisive cases) are final and cannot be appealed
terms.ch4_art3_item0: Any technical protest must be submitted to the committee 48 hours before the match
terms.ch4_art3_item1: An appeal may be submitted within 48 hours after the match
terms.ch4_art3_item2: The appeal is studied exclusively by the two committee presidents (Hammani Ayoub or Abada Mohamed) via the official platform
terms.ch5_art1_item0: The tournament honors the memory of the martyr "Bennadja Youcef" and the late "Boudjemaa Selimane"
terms.ch5_art1_item1: Commitment to fair play is mandatory in tribute to their memory
terms.ch5_art2_item0: Respect for neighborhood residents and spectators is mandatory for all teams and players
terms.ch5_art3_item0: The organizing committee is the sole authority authorized to interpret and enforce this constitution
terms.ch5_art4_item0: Legal responsibility lies with each team's manager for compliance with this regulation
terms.ch5_art5_item0: This constitution of 26 articles is the official and sole document governing the tournament
terms.committee1_task0: Inform teams of schedules, rules and amendments
terms.committee1_task2: Contact honorary guests for confirmation 24h before and reminder 2h before
terms.committee1_task3: Receive guests and facilitate their tasks (choosing man of the match / white card)
terms.committee2_task0: Prepare the field (boards, balls, mascot, cleaning)
terms.committee2_task1: Provide drinking water for teams, referees and medics
terms.committee2_task2: Permanent communication with the medic to ensure presence before kickoff
terms.committee3_task1: Appoint two assistant referees in case of official absence
terms.committee3_task2: Verify player identity, monitor substitutions and enforce penalties
terms.committee3_task3: Coordinate with national gendarmerie in critical cases
terms.committee4_task0: Enter results, goals and cards on the platform in real time
terms.committee4_task1: Track teams' financial status (prohibit debtors from participating)
terms.committee4_task2: Provide the joint presidency with a daily report on tournament status
terms.committee5_task1: Content management and publication on digital platforms
terms.committee5_task2: Highlighting sponsor logos and documenting the memory of the deceased (Bennadja Youcef and Boudjemaa)
terms.golden_rule0: Decision unity: the joint presidency is the sole reference for any exceptional decision
terms.golden_rule1: Daily report: each committee president submits their report at end of day to the joint presidency
terms.golden_rule2: Respect and example: committee members are the face of the tournament, discipline is the primary criterion
terms.golden_rule3: Communication: any urgent issue (security, medical, administrative) is resolved immediately according to the emergency schedule
terms.media_item0: Media coverage and photography for all matches 📸
terms.media_item1: Electronic platform for results and rankings in real time 📊
terms.media_item2: Highlighting sponsor logos and documenting the memory of the deceased
terms.refereeing_item0: Experienced federal referee corps in national competitions
terms.refereeing_item1: VAR technology to guarantee the rights of each team ✅
terms.refereeing_item2: Referee decisions are final and non-appealable

footer.slogan: From us to all – Créativité sans limite
footer.desc: A neighborhood football tournament bringing together the region's youth in a professional sporting atmosphere.
footer.tribute: Wafaa Edition — dedicated to Bennadja Youcef & Boudjemaa Selimane
